name: spoo · qr
description: QR generator service health, traffic, errors. Refresh 60s.

query.apl:
['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize requests = count(), tmin = min(_time), tmax = max(_time)
| extend window_s = todouble(datetime_diff('second', tmax, tmin))
| extend rps = iff(window_s > 0, round(requests / window_s, 2), 0.0)
| project rps

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status_code >= 500)
| extend error_rate = round(iff(total > 0, 100.0 * errors / total, 0.0), 3)
| project error_rate

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95)
| project p95

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and isnotnull(ip_hash)
| summarize uniques = dcount(ip_hash)
| project uniques

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| extend status_class = case(status_code < 300, '2xx', status_code < 400, '3xx', status_code < 500, '4xx', '5xx')
| summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), status_class

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize percentiles_array(duration_ms, 50, 95, 99) by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status_code >= 500) by bin_auto(_time)
| extend error_rate = iff(total > 0, round(100.0 * errors / total, 3), 0.0)
| project _time, error_rate

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize hits = count(), p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95) by path
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| summarize hits = count(), p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95) by path
| where hits >= 5
| top 20 by p95

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed' and status_code >= 500
| project _time, method, path, status_code, ip_hash, request_id
| top 50 by _time

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and (level == 'error' or level == 'exception')
| project _time, level, event, path, status_code, message
| order by _time desc
| take 100

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed' and isnotnull(method)
| summarize count() by method

['spoo-prod']
| where container_name == 'spoo_qr' and event == 'request_completed'
| extend status_class = case(status_code < 300, '2xx', status_code < 400, '3xx', status_code < 500, '4xx', '5xx')
| summarize count() by status_class
